title: Rei in 30
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Rei in 3.0             Quote Post by mastervampire » Wed Jun 02, 2010 3:46 am So at the end of 2.22 we saw Shinji pull Rei out from the angel and then all the blood transformed her and she then looks like the same size of Unit 1 ? Is that correct? A giant like in EoE? So then in 3.0 will they have some huge Rei walking around? I was just a bit confused on this and if anyone could explain it that would be great :)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jun 02, 2010 3:53 am Giant, as in the size of Eva-01. They then merged to form a sort-of-Eva-01 that had 2 cores. At this point nobody knows what's going to happen to the sort-of-Eva-01-with-2-cores thing, thought the preview mentioned that Shinji was trapped inside of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Delular » Wed Jun 02, 2010 6:46 am But why does Rei have purple eyes in the trailer for 3.03?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jun 02, 2010 10:45 am Don't put too much faith in the previews. They're clearly made quickly off some vague notions Anno has towards the sequel. Based on the teaser for 2.0 attached to the first film we would be talking about a VERY different film right now.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jun 02, 2010 12:51 pm some on /a/ think they yank out a rei-shinji combination from unit01. I think it'd be cool if they manage to pull out a Rei/yui mix, whatever that would mean.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 02, 2010 1:00 pm slothen wrote: some on /a/ think they yank out a rei-shinji combination from unit01.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Thu Jun 03, 2010 6:33 am I doubt Rei will be changed much for 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 03, 2010 10:11 am My bet is Rei will be Rei-3-ish in Lilithness (just not as cold-natured tho she will have made the Ikari-kun > Commander Ikari shift. Maybe Yui helps Rei figure out her feelings/wants so Rei's not stuck between them). Asuka will at least at first(?) have EoE-levels of bitterness (think pre and actual Instrumentality as well as final scene) before accepting what happened and not being as pissy at Shinji. But who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jun 03, 2010 10:18 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: My bet is Rei will be Rei-3-ish in Lilithness

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 03, 2010 10:37 am Red Giant Naked Rei isn't a tipoff?

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Thu Jun 03, 2010 10:59 am But why does Rei have purple eyes in the trailer for 3.03?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jun 03, 2010 10:59 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Red Giant Naked Rei isn't a tipoff?

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Thu Jun 03, 2010 12:33 pm Delular wrote: But why does Rei have purple eyes in the trailer for 3.03?

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Thu Jun 03, 2010 3:44 pm Possibly.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Jun 03, 2010 3:56 pm 2 weeks

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jun 03, 2010 3:57 pm In the case of 2.0, the theatre release date was announced in February, and the first trailer appeared in stores (on a screen, not for sale) in March. So maybe a month after the release date for 3.0 is announced is a good bet.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 03, 2010 5:42 pm Reichu wrote: Hopefully the story behind her and the Rei-lings will be interesting and unexpected.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinji_Fan » Thu Jun 03, 2010 6:54 pm I wonder if Gendo would take the chance to bring in Rei III if there is a chance they could save Rei. Chances are both are going to come out eventually and this is going to be the part when things really change for the ending from EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by flapjack » Fri Jun 04, 2010 1:16 am bump

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:46 am Using 2.0 as an example: The film came out late June 2009. Trailers started in March 2009. Release date announced in February 2009. Title announced in October 2008. So all you should really expect out of 3.0 this year is for the title to be announced this Fall. And if we're truly lucky and it comes out early enough in the year, maybe a definite release date announced. But I would only put hopes on a title and new variation of the Sadamoto Kids on the Staircase poster.
